title: memecylon subcordifolium
intro: Memecylon subcordifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "mangrove Melastome" due to its ability to thrive in coastal areas. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Memecylon subcordifolium include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Memecylon subcordifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
